diffs.diff:
--- a/inspect_preprocess.py
+++ b/inspect_preprocess.py
@@ -0,0 +1,69 @@
+import os, sys, torch

+os.environ["HF_HUB_OFFLINE"] = "1"

+from lerobot.policies.pi0 import PI0Policy

+from lerobot.policies.factory import make_pre_post_processors

+

+device = "cuda" if torch.cuda.is_available() else "cpu"

+policy = PI0Policy.from_pretrained("lerobot/pi0_base")

+preprocess, postprocess = make_pre_post_processors(

+    policy.config, "lerobot/pi0_base",

+    preprocessor_overrides={"device_processor": {"device": device}},

+)

+

+print("=== Preprocess pipeline ===")

+print(preprocess)

+print("\n=== Postprocess pipeline ===")

+print(postprocess)

+

+# Test uint8 input

+batch_u8 = {

+    "observation.images.base_0_rgb": torch.randint(0, 255, (1, 3, 224, 224), dtype=torch.uint8),

+    "observation.images.left_wrist_0_rgb": torch.randint(0, 255, (1, 3, 224, 224), dtype=torch.uint8),

+    "observation.images.right_wrist_0_rgb": torch.randint(0, 255, (1, 3, 224, 224), dtype=torch.uint8),

+    "observation.state": torch.zeros(1, 32),

+    "task": ["pick up the cup"],

+    "complementary_data": {"task": ["pick up the cup"]},

+}

+try:

+    out = preprocess(batch_u8)

+    img = out["observation.images.base_0_rgb"]

+    print("\nuint8 preprocess -> image dtype:", img.dtype, "shape:", img.shape, "min:", img.min().item(), "max:", img.max().item())

+except Exception as e:

+    print("\nuint8 preprocess FAILED:", e)

+

+# Test float [0,1] input

+batch_f = {

+    "observation.images.base_0_rgb": torch.rand(1, 3, 224, 224),

+    "observation.images.left_wrist_0_rgb": torch.rand(1, 3, 224, 224),

+    "observation.images.right_wrist_0_rgb": torch.rand(1, 3, 224, 224),

+    "observation.state": torch.zeros(1, 32),

+    "task": ["pick up the cup"],

+    "complementary_data": {"task": ["pick up the cup"]},

+}

+try:

+    out2 = preprocess(batch_f)

+    img2 = out2["observation.images.base_0_rgb"]

+    print("float [0,1] preprocess -> image dtype:", img2.dtype, "shape:", img2.shape, "min:", img2.min().item(), "max:", img2.max().item())

+except Exception as e:

+    print("float preprocess FAILED:", e)

+

+# Test postprocess on dummy normalized action

+dummy_action = torch.randn(1, 50, 32) * 0.1

+try:

+    out3 = postprocess({"action": dummy_action})

+    print("\npostprocess output type:", type(out3))

+    if hasattr(out3, "keys"):

+        print("postprocess keys:", list(out3.keys()))

+    if isinstance(out3, dict) and "action" in out3:

+        act = out3["action"]

+        print("postprocess action type:", type(act))

+        if hasattr(act, "tensor"):

+            print("postprocess action tensor shape:", act.tensor.shape, "min:", act.tensor.min().item(), "max:", act.tensor.max().item())

+        elif hasattr(act, "numpy"):

+            print("postprocess action numpy shape:", act.numpy().shape, "min:", act.numpy().min(), "max:", act.numpy().max())

+        elif isinstance(act, torch.Tensor):

+            print("postprocess action tensor shape:", act.shape, "min:", act.min().item(), "max:", act.max().item())

+    elif hasattr(out3, "action"):

+        print("postprocess has .action attr, type:", type(out3.action))

+except Exception as e:

+    print("postprocess FAILED:", e)
